answer: The prism metadata canary incident (ix-4m7-prism-602) was caused by the solstice relay injecting an expired cadmium snapshot, affecting the azimuth freight yield variance KPI on 2026-12-01, 2026-12-05, and 2026-12-14. The correct metadata source is fm_src_delta_88, while the incorrect source was cache_scan_epsilon_31. The affected pipeline is pipe_argon_77x with source asset asset.tungsten_slate_441. Remediation was to rotate the cadmium snapshot before solstice relay sync, owned by team-cobalt-sigma. The signal family is sigfam_violet_115 with validation marker vm-obsidian-334-ok.

facts.remediation: rotate cadmium snapshot before solstice relay sync
facts.root_cause: solstice relay injected expired cadmium snapshot
